meaning: n.劳动,努力,工作,劳工,分娩,阵痛vi.劳动,努力争取(for),苦干vt.详细分析,麻烦
examples: The developments leave the airline with several problems, including an unsettled labor situation.
The fruit of labor is sweetest.
After Labor Day we start classes.
They campaigned against it even though the president and secretary of labor said they supported AHPs.
Originally, it was terraced, with a flat top, and was the product of enormous labor.
